description: Job Highlights Exposure to AI, automation & contact center technologies Work with international clients & enterprise systems Career growth in solution engineering & system integration Job Summary We are looking for a Solutions Engineer to design, develop, and support IT solutions, including automation and AI-driven applications. This role is ideal for candidates who are passionate about programming, system integration, and emerging technologies. Key Responsibilities Design and implement scalable IT solutions and workflows Develop automation scripts using Python and integrate systems via APIs Work with JSON and APIs for data exchange and system integration Support and enhance contact center platforms (e.g. Genesys Cloud) Collaborate with internal teams and clients on solution delivery Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues efficiently Explore and apply AI tools (e.g. chatbot, NLP, automation) Requirements Bachelor’s degree in computer science / IT or related field 0–3 years of experience in software development or IT-related role Knowledge in Python programming Basic understanding of API integration and JSON Interest or exposure in AI / automation tools is an advantage Strong problem-solving and analytical skills Good communication and teamwork ability Preferred Skills Experience with Genesys Cloud or contact center systems Exposure to AI tools, chatbot, or machine learning frameworks Certifications in IT / programming / AI (optional but advantageous) Working Details Location: Q Sentral, Kuala Lumpur Working Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eligibility Malaysian citizens or Permanent Residents only
